text: Hey Jarvis, run through my schedule for today, please.
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, June 30. No work meetings today. You have Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center and gardening in the front walkway.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Busy day for sports! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Bedtime can be a challenge. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Reading scientific papers late tonight. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Reading a new book before bed. My starting running back is questionable. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Personal time is valuable. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Neighborhood connections are fun. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: The smart-home hub is acting up today. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah found a new recipe to try. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Yum, that sounds delicious! I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan's team played a match and won 1-0! Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. That's a big step. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Toddlers are full of energy. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Writing scripts to process image datasets. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Space science and tech is a great focus. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. My starting running back is questionable. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Good way to wrap up the day. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that hosted a game night at our place. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Catan is always a good time. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: The lawn mower is having issues starting. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Good call on checking that. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that cooking dinner for the kids tonight. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Yum, that sounds delicious! Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
